main-translation: And a river *continually* flowed out from Eden to water the garden; and from there it was *specifically* divided and branched into four *major* headwaters.
The name of the first *specifically* is Pishon; it is the one that *perpetually* encircles the entire land of Havilah, where there is *high-grade* gold.
And the gold of that land is *perfectly* good; there also is the *fragrant* bdellium and the *precious* onyx stone.
And the name of the second river is Gihon; it is the one that *perpetually* encircles the entire land of Cush.
And the name of the third river is Tigris; it is the one that *perpetually* flows toward the east of Assyria. And the fourth river is the Euphrates.
And Yahweh God *legally* took the man and *legally* stationed him in the garden of Eden to *forensically* cultivate it and to *vigilantly* guard it.
And Yahweh God *legally* commanded the man, *decreeing*: "From every tree of the garden you may *freely and continually* eat;"
"But from the Tree of the *forensic* Knowledge of Good and Evil, you shall *absolutely* not eat from it; for in the *exact* day of your eating from it, you shall *certainly and forensically* die."
And Yahweh God *legally* deliberated, "It is not *perfectly* good for the man to be in isolation; I will *specifically* fashion for him a *covenantal* helper who is a *perfect* counterpart to him."

And Yahweh God *specifically* formed from the ground every wild beast of the field and every bird of the heavens, and He brought them to the man to *forensically* observe what he would *legally* designate them; and whatever the man *legally* designated each living soul, that became its *forensic* name.

And the man *legally* designated names for all the cattle, and for the birds of the heavens, and for every wild beast of the field; but for Adam himself, there was not found a *covenantal* helper who was a *perfect* counterpart to him.
And Yahweh God caused a *supernatural* deep sleep to fall upon the man, and while he slept, He *specifically* took one of his ribs and *permanently* closed up the flesh in its place.
And Yahweh God *specifically* built the rib which He had taken from the man into a woman, and He *legally* presented her to the man.

And the man *forensically* declared, "This *specific* time, this is bone of my bones and flesh of my flesh; this *specific one* shall be *legally* designated 'Woman,' because from Man this *specific one* was taken."
Therefore shall a man *legally* leave his father and his mother, and he shall *permanently* cling to his wife; and they shall *forensically* become one flesh.
And they were both of them naked, the man and his wife, and they were not *forensically* ashamed.

Now the serpent was *more* shrewd than any wild beast of the field which Yahweh God had *specifically* fashioned; and he *adversarially* said to the woman, "Is it *actually* so, that God has *legally* commanded: 'You shall not eat from every tree of the garden'?"
And the woman *adversarially* said to the serpent, "From the fruit of the trees of the garden we may *freely* eat;"
"But from the fruit of the tree which is in the *middle* of the garden, God has *legally* commanded: 'You shall not eat from it, and you shall not *even* touch it, lest you *forensically* die.'"
And the serpent *adversarially* said to the woman, "You shall *absolutely* not *forensically* die!"
